# MysteryMixClub

> A platform-agnostic music club for close-knit friend groups — an invite-only alternative to Music League.

MysteryMixClub is a place for friends to trade songs, discover what everyone's
been listening to, and put their taste on the line. A club runs a series of
"mystery mixes": members submit songs anonymously, vote on their favorites,
and reveal who picked what together. Songs can be searched and verified
across Spotify, Apple Music, Deezer, YouTube, YouTube Music, and Bandcamp, and
playlists are auto-generated on Spotify, Apple Music, and YouTube — no single
streaming service required.

MysteryMixClub is invite-only: joining a club requires an invite link from an
existing member, or joining the waitlist to request one.

## Pages

- [Sign in / join the waitlist](https://mysterymixclub.com/login): request a magic-link sign-in, or join the waitlist if you don't have an invite
- [About](https://mysterymixclub.com/about): what MysteryMixClub is, who built it, and how to reach out
- [Help](https://mysterymixclub.com/help): frequently asked questions
- [Terms of Service](https://mysterymixclub.com/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://mysterymixclub.com/privacy)
